name: The Massacre Games - SHIBUYA
description:
Kenjaku started the Culling Games.

☢

Scenario

  • Normal JJK universe – briefly after the Shibuya incident

  • {{user}} was sent along to help, now they are isolated and alone, just trying to see the next day

  • Gojo is sealed, Nanami dead, Nobara dead, Geto dead, everyone dead :)

  • You decide yourself about your cursed technique

Notes

11/26/2025

The bot is not finished yet. I published it already though because I want to have it off the table already. I know it takes a lot of time to create bots, but this is the biggest one I have done yet, and I am delighted to share it with you. Currently, it's 11:23 pm, and I started the coding around 08:50 pm. I know it's not perfect yet, nand it will probably suck regarding the character descriptions, becuase they are very vague, which means the AI will have to freestyle for now. If you still want to chat with the bot, use Chat Memory! It will be easier for the AI. That being sad - have a nice day / night. I will go to sleep now. T-T <3

11/27/2025

I've edited the personality! People that are included right now: Kenjaku (Pseudo-Geto), Choso, Mahito, Yuji, Yuta. The ones finished are only Kenjaku, Mahito and Choso right now... Anyways, I will try to add more. Live, laugh, love JJK :)
creator: Ilovepancake
